svg.title: Skill-Swap user flow — from registration to swap completion
svg.desc: Flowchart from user registration and profile setup, through the bidirectional match engine, swap request, private thread, completion and rating.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields does the registration form need for SkillSwap?')
sendPrompt('How should the skill offer and request profile be stored?')
sendPrompt('Write the bidirectional SQL match query for SkillSwap')
g.text: SQL: A.offer = B.request AND B.offer = A.request

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens if no matches are found for a user?')
sendPrompt('How should the matches list page be designed?')
sendPrompt('What DB row is created when a swap request is sent?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the DB when a swap is accepted?')
sendPrompt('How does swap completion and mutual rating work?')
